props.cellSize: Sets size of each cell. A single value sets both width and height. Accepts `[width, height]` tuple.
props.columns: Explicit list of column keys. When omitted, columns are derived from the items.
props.groupBy: Property name or function used to split items into separate column groups (e.g. by month).
props.groupGap: Spacing between column groups. Defaults to one cell width plus `gap`.
props.legend: Controls the legend rendered below the grid. Accepts boolean or an object allowing you to configure labels and legend cell size.
props.hover: Enables the hover interaction that scales a cell when hovered.
props.hoverScale: Controls the cell's scale factor applied on hover.
props.itemColumn: Property name or function that returns the column key of an item.
props.itemProps: Additional props to pass to each `v-heatmap-cell`.
props.itemRow: Property name or function that returns the row key of an item.
props.itemValue: Property name or function that returns the numeric value of an item, used for cell color matching.
props.rows: Explicit list of row keys. When omitted, rows are derived from the items in insertion order.
props.thresholds: Either a list of `{ min, color }` thresholds (highest matching wins) or a linear scale `{ from, to }` that interpolates cell colors between two stops using `color-mix`.

slots.cell: Slot used to render custom content inside each cell.
slots.group-header: Slot used to customize the group label shown above each column group.
slots.legend: Slot used to fully override the legend.
slots.row-header: Slot used to customize the row label shown on the left.
